title: オークスの後に・最後のティアラヘ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon stuns the crowd with a breathtaking
run. Slowly but surely, people are beginning to
recognize her for her skills.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, there's no doubt Narita Brian will win
the second crown, and Hishi Amazon can't afford
to fall behind. Our next challenge will be the
Shuka Sho!
